channel.title: Washington County Registry of Deeds
channel.description: No dedicated registry news/RSS feed exists; monitored by full-page fingerprint of the official registry page. All fee/hours info inline on a single page. KNOWN ISSUE: washingtoncountymaine.com has been returning HTTP 403 to this bot's requests (likely WAF bot-blocking) since mid-2026; kept enabled so the status dashboard surfaces it and it recovers automatically if the block is lifted. [STALE: source last verified 2026-07-05T10:23:23.387922+00:00; 62 consecutive fetch failures since — items below may be out of date.]

item.title: Monitoring started: Washington County Registry of Deeds
item.description: This source is being monitored for changes. No update has been detected yet; a new item will appear here the next time the page changes. This placeholder confirms the feed is live.
